name: SuitDash
highlight_text: Category: Client and project management platform
description:
What Suitedash does

Suitedash is a white label client portal solution that helps agencies improve their efficiency and fortify bonds with their clients. It is a centralized platform for managing all your clients projects and organizational workflows.

Through Suitedash, agencies can manage many day-to-day operations and interaction with clients, and share information in real-time with colleagues.

Source: Suitedash

Key features 

  • Comprehensive client hub for managing all your clients engagements, projects, and workflows.
  • An all-in-one business management software multi-tool
  • Automation for time-consuming and repetitive tasks.
  • The collaborative workspace promotes real-time collaboration. 
  • Personalized performance insights for measuring core parameters, including the level of client satosfaction and aspects of your team’s performance.

Benefits of Using Suitedash 

  • It helps increase your agency's productivity.
  • It is scalable enough to accommodate any level of business growth.
  • It integrates seamlessly with  tools for client management and project execution.
  • Increased client satisfaction to foster a community of loyal customers for your agency.

Pricing 

  • Start at $19/month
  • Thrive at $49/month
  • Pinnacle at $99/month

Pros

✅Affordable

✅Easy to use

✅Supports mobile app

Cons

🚫Limited customisable options 

🚫May require technical knowledge to use.
